name: canvas-api-console
description: Local-first Canvas API console for authorized administrators.

scripts.build: node -e "const { rmSync } = require('node:fs'); rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node -e "const { cpSync } = require('node:fs'); cpSync('src/browser-app.js', 'dist/src/browser-app.js'); cpSync('src/browser-app.css', 'dist/src/browser-app.css');"
scripts.test: node -e "const { rmSync } = require('node:fs'); rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });" && vitest run tests
